title: Review/post Property Management Control Record LinkedIn draft
description:
First action: open the Drive draft and review the LinkedIn post for Wednesday 2026-06-24. Drive: https://docs.google.com/document/d/13kkx0PKUjg9CVONnfFhG32xJ-om8_-v90cWj2mO5z2w/edit. Local: memory/content/bank/2026-06-15/linkedin-property-management-control-record-2026-06-24.md.

Why it matters: this turns the property-management rent-delinquency control-record angle into a buyer-readable proof post that supports the current PM outreach sprint without naming private client details.

Done state: JT either posts it on LinkedIn, edits it, or marks it held. If posted, update posted-log and Notion status to Posted.
